text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sizzle, sizzle, my yummy veggie stir-fry. ♪ Then
plop it on a nice big pile of steaming rice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Down goes the miso soup with a big, big gulp. ♪
Guuulp...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what comes next again? Gulp, aaand...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Why can't I remember?! And after I went to all the
effort of making this lunch set song!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, now it's gonna drive me nuts! Does
anyone know the rest of the words?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to remember the lyrics,
Matikanetannhauser is left restless and
unsatisfied.
